figures.caption: Figure 13: Robustness and generalization of RAGent across different LLM backends and distribution-shift settings.

Figure 8: Council-of-Experts reasoning. Historian, Observer, and Physicist produce role-specific reports from retrieval, semantic, and physical evidence, and the Judge resolves the final activity label under physics-gated arbitration.

Figure 3: RAGent overview. The framework follows an offline-to-online workflow with three stages: (1) Knowledge-Base Construction, (2) Physics-Driven Numerical Retrieval, and (3) Council-of-Experts Reasoning.
Figure 10: Activities in the dataset. 2,568 radar segments are collected from 8 participants performing 12 activities across 3 environments.
Figure 11: Overall performance. RAGent achieves 93.39% accuracy without per-domain retraining or target-domain adaptation.
